endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/pages
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/pages/{pageId}
endpoints.description: Gets a page by blog id and page id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{PAGEID}} with a real pageid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/posts
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}
endpoints.description: Gets a post by blog id and post id
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/blogs/{blogId}/posts/{postId}/comments/{commentId}
endpoints.description: Gets a comment by blog id, post id and comment id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{COMMENTID}} with a real commentid. Replace {{BLOGID}} with a real blogid. Replace {{POSTID}} with a real postid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/users/{userId}
endpoints.description: Gets a user by user id.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.

endpoints.name: GET /v2/users/{userId}/blogs
endpoints.description: Lists blogs by user id, possibly filtered.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{USERID}} with a real userid.
